lesson.menu_desc: Future with going to & will -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 13 -- Making Plans
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Tânia Rosa | Aula 13 -- Making Plans

listenings.text: Next month I am going to take the trip of my dreams. I have a plan for everything. First, I am going to book my flights and find a small hotel near the old town. I am also going to save up a little more money, because I want to enjoy good food without worrying about my budget. I have a long packing list, and I am going to start early this time. I am really looking forward to it. To be honest, the planning is almost as fun as the trip itself. I can't wait to see new places and meet new people.

For years, I never planned my trips. I just packed a bag and left, and something always went wrong. I missed a flight once because I had no plan at all. So I changed. Now I make a simple plan before every trip. I set a small budget, I write a packing list, and I book the important things early. If a problem comes up, I do not panic. I will find a solution, I tell myself. Planning does not take the magic away. It gives me time to relax and enjoy the journey. I am going to plan my next trip this weekend, and I can't wait.

extra_audio.text: First, Tânia decides on the destination and sets a budget. Then she books her flights early to save money. Next, she writes a long packing list so she forgets nothing. After that, she and her friend plan the days together. Finally, they look forward to the trip and can't wait to leave.
